Software Design Specification - Sample Module
==============================================

1. Overview
   SwCom_Comm: Communication module for LIN gateway data processing.

2. Software Components

   SwCom_Comm_001
     Description: Communication initialization component
     Functions: g_comm_init
     ASIL: ASIL-B
     Related: REQ-SW-001

   SwCom_Comm_002
     Description: Frame processing component
     Functions: g_process_frame
     ASIL: ASIL-B
     Related: REQ-SW-002

   SwCom_Comm_003
     Description: Module reset component
     Functions: g_comm_reset
     ASIL: QM
     Related: REQ-SW-003

3. Module Structure
   - Interface Functions: g_comm_init, g_process_frame, g_comm_reset
   - Internal Functions: s_get_counter
   - Global Data: g_buffer, g_counter
